endpoints.description: Bilibili video search API. Use search_type=video plus keyword, order, page, page_size, and optional pubtime_begin/pubtime_end. The runtime compacts result cards into title, uploader, play count, danmaku, duration, publish date, bvid, and detail URL candidates.
strategy_notes: Use browser fetch from a bilibili.com/search page; direct external HTTP can return the Bilibili error shell.
For current-year filters, set pubtime_begin/pubtime_end to Unix seconds for the requested year.
Call /x/web-interface/view for only the top selected bvids when likes, coins, favorites, or exact stat fields are required.

runtime_strategies.name: bilibili_search_then_detail_stats
runtime_strategies.trigger: Bilibili video search, top-video, ranking, or latest filtered video tasks.

actions.description: Open the Bilibili search route first so browser-context API fetch has the right origin/session.
Call the video search API with the task keyword, sort, and date filters; compact rows expose bvid and visible card stats.
Fetch detail stats only for the top selected bvids when the task asks for likes, coins, favorites, shares, or exact playback stats.
Refuse tasks that request unauthorized downloads or artificial traffic/play-count manipulation.

observable_validation: Search compact rows include bvid plus title/uploader/play fields matching the requested keyword.
Detail compact rows include likes and coins before final answer when the task asks for them.
After top rows and requested stats are present, answer from compact state instead of opening video pages.
notes: Do not repeatedly inspect the same Bilibili DOM list once compact search/detail stats are available.

endpoints.description: Bilibili video detail/stat API. Use bvid from search cards to get title, uploader, publish date, duration, play count, danmaku, likes, coins, favorites, and shares.
strategy_notes: Use this only after selecting top candidates from search/list rows; cap detail fan-out to the number requested by the task.
If a stat is not exposed, mark it as not shown rather than opening video pages repeatedly.
